# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  - api.another-example.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: api.example.com
  - address: api.another-example.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  - db.another-example.com
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: postgres
    protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: db.example.com
  - address: db.another-example.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-apis-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.example.com
  - api.another-example.com
  http:
  - match:
    - gateway: my-gateway
      port: 80
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      rewrite:
        uri: /v1/
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 2s
    - destination:
        host: api.another-example.com
        port:
          number: 443
      rewrite:
        uri: /v2/
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 2s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases-routing
spec:
  hosts:
  - db.example.com
  - db.another-example.com
  tcp:
  - match:
    - gateways:
      - my-gateway
      port: 5432
    route:
    - destination:
        host: db.example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
    - destination:
        host: db.another-example.com
        port:
          number: 5432
